articles.title: Cardano Will Surpass Bitcoin and Ethereum: Cardano Founder
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, Cardano founder, predicts that the blockchain platfoFrm’s cryptocurrency, ADA, will surpass Bitcoin and Ethereum to become the biggest cryptocurrency in the world. Hoskinson predicted the Rare Evo blockchain event and said his product is currently the number one blockchain in development activity. articles.title: SHIB Price Explosion Hangs On As Shiba Inu’s Shibarium Relaunch Proves To Be ‘Game-Changer Factor’
articles.description: After a shaky start to life, Shiba Inu’s Shibarium is inching toward a relaunch with developers introducing new measures to handle soaring demand levels.

articles.title: September ‘crash’ to $22K? — 5 things to know in Bitcoin this week
articles.description: The BTC price looks frail as August comes to an end, and with Bitcoin bulls out of ammo, traders are preparing for more pain.
